items.title: Want to feel happier at work? Take a five-minute walk
items.summary: Sitting for prolonged periods is associated with health complications – but you can counteract the risks of a sedentary life.

items.summary: Krvni testovi koji mogu otkriti desetke različitih vrsta raka iz jednog uzorka krvi mogli bi uskoro promijeniti način na koji se provodi probir na zlo

items.title: Zašto žene teže podnose vrućinu od muškaraca? Znanost ima objašnjenje
items.summary: BRITANSKI liječnik objašnjava biološke razloge zašto žene teže podnose vrućinu.

items.title: The tea in your kombucha changes more than just the taste
items.summary: Scientists discovered that kombucha’s flavor, chemistry, and antioxidant activity vary dramatically depending on the tea used to make it. Green and oolong tea kombuchas emerged as the most biologically active, while fermentation transformed each tea into a distinctly different beverage.

items.title: Scientists finally solved how H5N1 bird flu hid in dairy cows
items.summary: Researchers uncovered why H5N1 bird flu attacks cows’ udders instead of their lungs: the virus’s preferred receptors are concentrated in mammary tissue. The breakthrough could help scientists predict future bird flu jumps and spot unusual infections before they spread widely.

items.title: Hlade li nas vrući napitci tijekom vrućina? Znanost ima odgovor
items.summary: SUPROTNO uvriježenom mišljenju, vrući napitci mogu rashladiti tijelo - ali ne u svim uvjetima.

items.title: Liječnik upozorava: U ovo doba dana nemojte vježbati tijekom toplinskog vala
items.summary: VRUĆINE koje stižu donose i veći rizik od toplinske iscrpljenosti.

items.title: New brain study reveals speech learning works differently than we thought
items.summary: A new study suggests that learning and remembering speech relies more on how the brain processes sounds and sensations than on the areas that control mouth and face movements. The discovery could reshape speech therapy and help improve future brain-based communication technologies.

items.title: Lubenica nije jedini spas: Ovo voće i povrće najbolje hidratizira organizam
